name: graph-permissions-explorer
description: Microsoft Graph API İzinleri Keşif Aracı - Graph Permissions Explorer

scripts.build:fixture: node Script/node/normalize-data.js --raw-dir fixtures/raw --output .generated/fixtures --ingested-at 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z && node Script/node/validate-data.js --input .generated/fixtures/site-data.json --fixture && node Script/node/build-site.js --input .generated/fixtures/site-data.json --output docs
scripts.clean: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('docs', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('fs').rmSync('.generated', { recursive: true, force: true })"
